title: Solvite Wallpaper Repair Kit: Overlap & Border Adhesive (240g) with Tsekouri Foam Roller & Smoother for Seamless Wall Covering, Easy DIY Glue & Tools
features: Includes Solvite Wallpaper Repair, Overlap & Border Adhesive (240g) and Tsekouri Foam Roller & Smoother Tool – everything you need for quick fixes and precision application.
Save time and money with this all-in-one wallpaper repair and application set – no need to buy tools and adhesive separately.
Solvite’s ready-to-use formula provides strong, long-lasting adhesion for borders and seams, while the Tsekouri roller and smoother combo ensures a flawless, professional finish.
Worried about messy application or bubbling? The ergonomic roller evenly distributes pressure, and the smoother edge gives you clean lines—no experience needed.
Whether you're patching a tear or adding a decorative border, this reliable set makes it easy to get perfect results every time.
description: This comprehensive bundle provides the essential tools for both quick wallpaper repairs and precise application of borders and overlapping seams, ensuring a professional and seamless finish. Solvite Wallpaper Repair, Overlap & Border Adhesive (1x240g): Function: This specially formulated, ready-to-use adhesive is designed for targeted wallpaper repairs, securely hanging borders, and creating strong, invisible overlaps on wallpaper seams. Its robust formula ensures long-lasting adhesion. Material: Water-based adhesive (exact chemical composition proprietary to Solvite, but typically contains modified starches or cellulose ethers for binding). Dimensions: Approximately 7 cm (diameter) x 15 cm (height) for the 240g tub (exact dimensions may vary slightly). Weight: 240g (net weight of adhesive) + packaging weight. Storage Details: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and frost. Ensure the lid is tightly sealed after each use to prevent drying out. For best results, use within 12 months of opening. Keep out of reach of children. Tsekouri Foam Roller & Smoother: Function: This dual-purpose tool is engineered to simplify wallpaper application. The foam roller is ideal for evenly distributing pressure to eliminate air bubbles and ensure firm contact between the wallpaper and the wall. The integrated smoother edge allows for precise trimming along edges and in corners, creating crisp, clean lines.
